commands.review_summary:
The PR makes verified message-tool-owned source sends satisfy source delivery and adds regression coverage for suppressing trailing final assistant text after that send.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +95. Total +97 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main creates message-tool-only plans with private final text, but the outcome resolver does not mark pure message_tool verified sends as satisfying source delivery. I did not run a live channel reproduction in this read-only review.
